scripts.package:portable: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $version=(Get-Content package.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json).version; $release='src-tauri/target/release'; $out='src-tauri/target/release/bundle/portable'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $out | Out-Null; $zip=Join-Path $out ('DanmuTools_' + $version + '_x64_portable.zip'); Remove-Item $zip -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Compress-Archive -Path (Join-Path $release 'danmu-tools.exe') -DestinationPath $zip; Write-Host $zip"
